title: SUMMER OVERNIGHT CAMP - 211info
text: SALVATION ARMY GRESHAM CORPS SUMMER OVERNIGHT CAMP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates the Christian faith-based overnight Camp Kuratli at Trestle Glen in Boring, Oregon. 473 SE 194th Avenue Portland, OR 97233 Eligibility: Ages 7-16 Hours: Varies Email (503) 661-8972 414 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 661-8972 ext 414 Marcia McQuade Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: $325-$425, partial scholarship may be available DOCUMENTS: Application required AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah County east of I-205 SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-12pm Services: Camps Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
